_nota: English language file — internal keys, localized values
avvio_saluto:
Hello {nome_utente}! I am your assistant {nome_avatar}.
Type 'help' to see what I can do.
avvio_memoria_vuota:
Unfortunately my memory is empty.
If it shouldn't be, fix and restore the file
  .\_dati\memoria.json.bak
apri_cosa: What should I open? Please give me a name.
apri_non_trovato: Sorry, I could not find '{q}' in memory.
dammi_cosa: What should I give you? Tell me the name.
cerca_cosa: What should I search for in memory?
elimina_cosa: What should I delete from memory?
elimina_non_trovato: I could not find '{q}' in memory.
modifica_non_trovato: I could not find '{q}' in memory.
modifica_trovata:
Entry found:
{entry}
Which field do you want to edit?
You can write just the field (e.g. 'data') or field and value (e.g. 'data ABC123...')
modifica_errore: Error: entry not found in memory.
copia_cosa: What should I copy to the clipboard?
copia_non_trovato: I could not find '{q}' in memory.
ricorda_chiedi_nome: What should I remember? Tell me the name:
ricorda_chiedi_dati: Ok, tell me the data to remember for '{nome}':
ricorda_img_nome: What name should I associate with this image?
ricorda_img_tag: What description (tag) do you want to add?
impara_intro:
Guided entry — one field at a time.
Type 'skip' for optional fields, 'cancel' to abort.
impara_salvato:
Saved! '{nome}' in memory.

Do you want to add another entry? (yes / no)
impara_prompt_soggetto: Subject / owner (optional — type 'skip' to use your name):
impara_prompt_tag: Tags / labels (optional — e.g. family, health, work — type 'skip' to skip):
impara_prompt_avatar:
Avatar (optional — type 'skip' for 'sorridente'):
  sorridente · soddisfatto · triste · bibliotecaria · magazziniere · benvenuto
aiuto_testo:
Here is what I can do:

  remember — save information to memory
  learn    — guided entry field by field
  get      — retrieve saved information
  open     — open a saved link or file
  search   — search memory
  list     — show everything I remember
  edit     — edit a saved entry
  delete   — remove an entry from memory
  copy     — copy data to clipboard
  language — change language (e.g. language it)
  exit     — say goodbye and close
  help     — show this message

Use the ▶ panel on the right for quick buttons.
non_capito:
I'm sorry, I did not understand. Can you help me?
Keywords: remember · learn · get · open · search
          list · edit · delete · copy · exit · help
stt_non_capito: I did not understand, please try again.
shortcut_nessuno:
No shortcuts configured.
Add the key
"shortcut" in
configurazione.json
